description: Maven POM fixture with one entry in the vulnerable Text4Shell range. `org.apache.commons:commons-text@1.9` falls inside the 1.5..1.9 inclusive range recorded in vulnerabilities/supply-chain/malicious-packages/maven.json (CVE-2022-42889, RCE via StringSubstitutor). `junit:junit@4.13.2` is a clean control entry. Note on `kind`: the underlying maven.json entry carries `"type": "vulnerable_library"` (a legitimate library with a known CVE, not a malicious package per se), but the scanner harness collapses both `malicious` and `vulnerable_library` source categories to the `malicious` finding kind via `_category_to_kind()` in evals/benchmarks/scanner-eval.py. The expected_findings entry uses `malicious` to match that mapping; introducing a distinct `vulnerable_library` finding kind is a scanner-side change tracked separately.
